name: int4-mtp-bi0-surgattn
description: int4 W4A16 Gemma-4-E4B target + QAT-matched gemma4_assistant MTP drafter (speculative decoding), run under VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT=0 (fast kernels) with a surgical force-2D TRITON_ATTN patch: the attention single-pass path is byte-exact between the M=1 AR decode and the M=K spec-verify forwards (M- and seq_len-invariant), so greedy-token identity holds without paying the global batch-invariant 'BI-tax' on every GEMM/RMSNorm/softmax.
